steps.title: Compare the medians
steps.content: Both dot plots have the same middle value. The median of data set A is $13$, and the median of data set B is also $13$, so statement I is true.

steps.title: Compare the spreads
steps.content: Data set B has more values farther from the center, while data set A has more values closer to the center. That means their standard deviations are not equal, so statement II is false.

steps.title: Select the true statement
steps.content: Only statement I must be true. The answer is A.
